calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-05-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-05-2019 Judgment Entered

Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted
Off Calendar Jul-02-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Attorney Vivian Leung Lerche 415-680-5731 special appearance for plaintiff. No other appearances.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC's Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted is unopposed and granted. All facts referenced in Plaintiff's Request for Admissions, Set One, are deemed admitted. Monetary sanctions are awarded in the sum of $260.00 as against the defendant to be paid within twenty days of the date of service of a copy of his Order with Notice of Entry. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2019 Set For Trial On Aug-05-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
